query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: Iran conflict sends oil prices sharply higher
articles.description: Oil surged to almost $87 a barrel, its highest level in a month after the United States and Iran traded attacks as they vied over the Hormuz Strait.

articles.title: Rising Tensions: Economic Repercussions of Iran Conflict
articles.description: Germany's two-year bond yield peaks amid Iran tensions, fearing an energy price surge could ignite inflation and interest rate hikes. Eurozone borrowing costs briefly slowed due to U.S. inflation data. Tensions in Middle East push oil prices to new highs, affecting global markets and interest rate expectations.

articles.title: Inflation Eases Amidst Volatile Energy Prices: A Temporary Respite?
articles.description: June saw a slowdown in US CPI inflation to 3.5%, fueled by a decline in gasoline prices. However, core inflation remained flat. Despite temporary relief, rising global crude prices and geopolitical tensions hint at future challenges. Trump focuses on curbing inflation with mid-term elections approaching.

articles.title: US CPI inflation cools to 3.5% in June as energy prices see a big drop
articles.description: The drop in headline inflation, however, may not sustain as the global crude oil prices have started climbing again after falling to pre-conflict levels last month.

articles.title: Stocks waver after CPI report while oil prices jump as fighting flares in the Middle East
articles.description: Oil prices are higher and world shares are mixed after markets in Tokyo and Seoul rebounded from early losses

articles.title: Falling gas prices cut U.S. inflation in June but Iran worries remain
articles.description: U.S. inflation cooled last month as the cost of gas, clothes, and used cars fell, providing some relief to consumers, though much of the progress could be reversed if the Iran war keeps worsening.
